Brighten Your Backyard!



Brighter days don’t have to end when the sun goes down. Make your next backyard movie night a blockbuster with The Day Brightener Sweepstakes.

Enter for a chance to win the grand prize: A short-throw projector, projector screen and camping chairs courtesy of Brightspeed with no nonsense, purchase, commitment or strings attached. You’ll also be entered to win other great prizes, too!



NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER FOR A CHANCE TO WIN. A purchase will not increase your chances of winning. Open only to legal residents of the states of ALABAMA and TEXAS, who are 18 years of age and older. Some residency restrictions apply. Void where prohibited. The sweepstakes BEGINS ON JANUARY 22, 2025 and ENDS ON MAY 1, 2025. For entry information and official rules with complete eligibility, prize description and other details, visit eventlinkgroup.com/rules. Sponsored by: Brightspeed
